'''ngafomo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yoctoliter|yoctoliter]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-f-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yoctoliter|yoctoliter]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| ngafomo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæfemeth|ngæfemeth]] || [[word:ngæfemej|ngæfemej]] || [[word:ngæfemesh|ngæfemesh]] || [[word:ngæfeme|ngæfeme]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngafofomoth|ngafofomoth]] || [[word:ngafofomoj|ngafofomoj]] || [[word:ngafofomosh|ngafofomosh]] || [[word:ngafofomo|ngafofomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngafomoth|ngafomoth]] || [[word:ngafomoj|ngafomoj]] || [[word:ngafomosh|ngafomosh]] || [[word:ngafomo|ngafomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngafofmoth|ngafofmoth]] || [[word:ngafofmoj|ngafofmoj]] || [[word:ngafofmosh|ngafofmosh]] || [[word:ngafofmof|ngafofmof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngafomotho|ngafomotho]] || [[word:ngafomojo|ngafomojo]] || [[word:ngafomosho|ngafomosho]] || [[word:ngafomoko|ngafomoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngafomoth|ngafomoth]] || [[word:ngafomoj|ngafomoj]] || [[word:ngafomosh|ngafomosh]] || [[word:ngafomo|ngafomo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngafomothol|ngafomothol]] || [[word:ngafomojol|ngafomojol]] || [[word:ngafomoshol|ngafomoshol]] || [[word:ngafomokol|ngafomokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngafomothotho|ngafomothotho]] || [[word:ngafomojojo|ngafomojojo]] || [[word:ngafomoshosho|ngafomoshosho]] || [[word:ngafomoko|ngafomoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngafomothon|ngafomothon]] || [[word:ngafomojon|ngafomojon]] || [[word:ngafomoshon|ngafomoshon]] || [[word:ngafomokon|ngafomokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngafomothoro|ngafomothoro]] || [[word:ngafomojoro|ngafomojoro]] || [[word:ngafomoshoro|ngafomoshoro]] || [[word:ngafomokoro|ngafomokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
